short.en: End-to-end product build — CAD, firmware, PCB, printing, assembly. One person, one timeline.
short.sl: Celosten razvoj izdelka — CAD, firmware, PCB, tisk, sestavljanje. Ena oseba, ena časovnica.

long.en: Some projects need every discipline at once. I take the brief, design the mechanics, write the firmware, route the electronics, print the enclosure, assemble it, and hand you a working unit. This is the package behind the smart piggy bank, the cocktail dispenser, and other hybrids in the portfolio.
long.sl: Nekateri projekti potrebujejo vsa področja hkrati. Sprejmem brief, zasnujem mehaniko, napišem firmware, narišem elektroniko, natisnem ohišje, sestavim in predam delujočo enoto. Tak paket stoji za pametno hranilnico, dispenzorjem za koktajle in drugimi hibridi v portfelju.

en: All CAD, firmware, and electronics source files
sl: Vsi izvorni CAD, firmware in elektronika

en: A description of the problem the product solves
Constraints: size, budget, deadline, target audience
sl: Opis problema, ki ga izdelek rešuje
Omejitve: velikost, proračun, rok, ciljna skupina
